## Meeting Purpose

[Align content strategy and discuss calibration article for Udemy's B2B blog](https://fathom.video/share/Q4bwNy9eFfZBrF9w7ve7Zhmt5Y8GFjpc?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on AI transformation pillars (e.g. AI upskilling, implementation, literacy) with semantic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/Q4bwNy9eFfZBrF9w7ve7Zhmt5Y8GFjpc?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [Prioritize fixing critical technical issues like page speed before complex content structure changes](https://fathom.video/share/Q4bwNy9eFfZBrF9w7ve7Zhmt5Y8GFjpc?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
  - [Need to determine content authorship approach balancing instructors, UB team members, and editing process](https://fathom.video/share/Q4bwNy9eFfZBrF9w7ve7Zhmt5Y8GFjpc?tab=summary&timestamp=2938.0)
  - [Align on internal linking strategy and incorporate .edu/.gov sources for credibility](https://fathom.video/share/Q4bwNy9eFfZBrF9w7ve7Zhmt5Y8GFjpc?tab=summary&timestamp=2328.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Alignment

  - [Justin's approved strategy focuses on AI transformation, technical upskilling, L\&D](https://fathom.video/share/Q4bwNy9eFfZBrF9w7ve7Zhmt5Y8GFjpc?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [Pillars: AI upskilling, implementation, literacy with semantic clusters underneath](https://fathom.video/share/Q4bwNy9eFfZBrF9w7ve7Zhmt5Y8GFjpc?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [Prioritize B2B-focused, low-volume keywords to differentiate from consumer blog](https://fathom.video/share/Q4bwNy9eFfZBrF9w7ve7Zhmt5Y8GFjpc?tab=summary&timestamp=1972.0)
  - [GrowthX to focus on AI transformation content, freeing Justin for technical upskilling](https://fathom.video/share/Q4bwNy9eFfZBrF9w7ve7Zhmt5Y8GFjpc?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)

### Calibration Article Feedback

  - [Add primary keyword and target link at beginning](https://fathom.video/share/Q4bwNy9eFfZBrF9w7ve7Zhmt5Y8GFjpc?tab=summary&timestamp=2224.0)
  - [Make anchor text more descriptive (e.g. "upskilling manufacturing businesses" vs just "manufacturing")](https://fathom.video/share/Q4bwNy9eFfZBrF9w7ve7Zhmt5Y8GFjpc?tab=summary&timestamp=2281.0)
  - [Include 1-2 .edu/.gov external sources for credibility](https://fathom.video/share/Q4bwNy9eFfZBrF9w7ve7Zhmt5Y8GFjpc?tab=summary&timestamp=2328.0)
  - [Ensure all internal links are relevant to anchor text](https://fathom.video/share/Q4bwNy9eFfZBrF9w7ve7Zhmt5Y8GFjpc?tab=summary&timestamp=2392.0)
  - [Make CTAs more action-oriented and UB-focused](https://fathom.video/share/Q4bwNy9eFfZBrF9w7ve7Zhmt5Y8GFjpc?tab=summary&timestamp=2366.0)

### Content Production Workflow

  - [Need to determine authorship approach (instructors vs UB team members)](https://fathom.video/share/Q4bwNy9eFfZBrF9w7ve7Zhmt5Y8GFjpc?tab=summary&timestamp=2938.0)
  - [Establish editing/approval process to scale to 5+ pieces per week](https://fathom.video/share/Q4bwNy9eFfZBrF9w7ve7Zhmt5Y8GFjpc?tab=summary&timestamp=2619.0)
  - [GrowthX has capacity to produce higher volume if needed](https://fathom.video/share/Q4bwNy9eFfZBrF9w7ve7Zhmt5Y8GFjpc?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)

### Technical Priorities

  - [Critical to improve page speed (currently very poor, affecting conversions)](https://fathom.video/share/Q4bwNy9eFfZBrF9w7ve7Zhmt5Y8GFjpc?tab=summary&timestamp=2674.0)
  - [Need blog homepage and better pillar/cluster structure](https://fathom.video/share/Q4bwNy9eFfZBrF9w7ve7Zhmt5Y8GFjpc?tab=summary&timestamp=2821.0)
  - [Consider emphasizing technical fixes over complex new content structures for now](https://fathom.video/share/Q4bwNy9eFfZBrF9w7ve7Zhmt5Y8GFjpc?tab=summary&timestamp=2743.0)

### Collaboration Process

  - [Justin's strategy approved internally, provides good direction](https://fathom.video/share/Q4bwNy9eFfZBrF9w7ve7Zhmt5Y8GFjpc?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
  - [GrowthX to adapt workflows to align with Udemy's needs](https://fathom.video/share/Q4bwNy9eFfZBrF9w7ve7Zhmt5Y8GFjpc?tab=summary&timestamp=2157.0)
  - [Regular alignment needed as teams navigate new partnership](https://fathom.video/share/Q4bwNy9eFfZBrF9w7ve7Zhmt5Y8GFjpc?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Discuss page speed and technical priorities in next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/Q4bwNy9eFfZBrF9w7ve7Zhmt5Y8GFjpc?tab=summary&timestamp=2875.0)
  - [Determine content authorship and editing approach](https://fathom.video/share/Q4bwNy9eFfZBrF9w7ve7Zhmt5Y8GFjpc?tab=summary&timestamp=2938.0)
  - [GrowthX to refine pillar/cluster strategy based on feedback](https://fathom.video/share/Q4bwNy9eFfZBrF9w7ve7Zhmt5Y8GFjpc?tab=summary&timestamp=1910.0)
  - [Align on internal linking and external source guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/Q4bwNy9eFfZBrF9w7ve7Zhmt5Y8GFjpc?tab=summary&timestamp=2224.0)
  - [Review competitor analysis to ensure B2B focus](https://fathom.video/share/Q4bwNy9eFfZBrF9w7ve7Zhmt5Y8GFjpc?tab=summary&timestamp=1972.0)
